meta.phase-name: AI Integration Architecture and Schema Authoring Plan

phase-summary.outcome: Phase 50 planning baseline is established: roadmap/task/state are registered, agent ownership is active, and decision records define the AI integration stack plus temporary references source policy. Implementation work is now ready to be split into executable slices.

file.description: Added new Phase 50 entry with goals, dependencies, requirements, and plan pointer.
Added 50-01 task claim under agent-20260303-dzgh with planning commands and dependency.
Registered new agent id, set Phase 50 as active roadmap focus, and queued next-action for 50-02 execution.
Logged AI integration baseline and missing REQUIREMENTS.xml decision.
Created detailed planning artifact with scope, files, tasks, decisions, and references.

tests.test: Validated XML files are well-formed by reviewing generated documents and existing schema conventions.

next.action: Create `50-02` execution plan with explicit API contracts, auth/session boundaries, schema mutation validation rules, and milestone-level acceptance tests.
